name: Sync Issues
sequence: Sync sprint-status.yaml entries to GitLab/GitHub Issues — create missing issues, reconcile statuses, manage labels.
column17: Reads issue_tracking.platform from _bmad/custom/issue-tracking.yaml to pick glab or gh CLI. Issue-tracker-first with file-system fallback.

name: Issue Tracking Setup
sequence: One-time setup: deploy TOML overrides, shared tasks, and configure platform.
column17: Run after installing the module. Deploys TOML overrides to _bmad/custom/ and shared tasks to _bmad/_config/custom/.
